title: Silly Weapons
description: A mod that adds a whole bunch of silly weapons
body:
Silly Weapons is a mod that i made using mcreator that adds a whole bunch of silly weapons and sound effects for the related weapons. so far it is just a frying pan but i am hoping to expand the mod further and have it contain more diverse weapons. You will find the weapons in the silly weapons tab of the creative inventory. 

Frying Pan- 5 attack damage, 6.7 attack speed, 1024 durabilty. stun mobs you hit with it temporarily (gives them slowness 100 for 2.5 seconds). repaired with iron ingots when damaged.

Disor- 20 attack damage, 6 attack speed, 3940 durability. repaired with turtle scutes when on low durability.

School Bus- 7 attack damage, 1.9 attack speed, 2031 durability. concusses enemies when you hit them with it (a few seconds of nausea, darkness and slowness).
